gui.credit.notice.unsupported: Editing not supported for this category
gui.credit.notice.sample: Showing existing recipe as sample (edit any slot to start a draft)
gui.credit.settings.persistence.label: Edit save persistence
gui.credit.settings.persistence.min.name: Minimum
gui.credit.settings.persistence.min.desc: Edits are discarded when the editor closes
gui.credit.settings.persistence.normal.d: Edits persist until the game exits (default)
gui.credit.settings.persistence.max.name: Maximum
gui.credit.settings.persistence.max.desc: Edits saved to config/credit-drafts.dat and restored on game restart
gui.credit.settings.crafting_share.label: Share Shaped/Shapeless edits
gui.credit.settings.crafting_share.desc: When ON, switching Shaped/Shapeless keeps the same grid contents
gui.credit.settings.undo.label: Track edits (Ctrl+Z)
gui.credit.settings.undo.desc: Disable to skip undo snapshot capture (perf saving)
gui.credit.settings.delete_data.label: Delete edit data (Shift+Click)
gui.credit.settings.delete_data.done: [CraftPattern] Edit data and persistence file deleted
gui.credit.settings.reset.label: Reset settings (Shift+Click)
gui.credit.tagbar.cfg.empty_hint: Drop an item/fluid/gas here to configure its behavior
gui.credit.tagbar.finder.hint: Click to reopen list / Shift+right-click to clear
gui.credit.heat.hint: Click to cycle / Shift+click for none
gui.credit.keep_held.hint: Click to toggle / Shift+click for OFF
gui.credit.unsupported.click_close: Click again or click elsewhere to close
gui.credit.unsupported.viewer: View-only page (info or diagram). Not a recipe, can't be edited
gui.credit.unsupported.no_kubejs: Recipe type that doesn't accept KubeJS. No way to add recipes via KubeJS for this type
gui.credit.unsupported.vanilla_routed: This is just a vanilla recipe shown via a mod machine. Edit it in the vanilla recipe category
gui.credit.unsupported.dynamic: Recipes are generated dynamically by rule, so KubeJS can't intervene
gui.credit.unsupported.internal: Internal type — not meant to be authored directly by the player
gui.credit.unsupported.complex: Structure too complex; UI editor not implemented yet
gui.credit.unsupported.deferred: Extended format (9x9 / chained recipe etc.); deferred for future support
gui.credit.unsupported.irregular: Exceptional recipe structure — cannot be created reliably
gui.credit.warn.exceptional_nbt: This recipe contains ingredients with special NBT. The edited result may not match the original
gui.credit.settings.tab.convenience.tip: Drag defaults, auto-reload after push, and other QoL settings
gui.credit.settings.tab.critical.tip: Edit tracking, immediate apply, grid preservation — core editing behavior
gui.credit.settings.tab.misc.tip: Dump root, history retention, file layout — other settings
gui.credit.settings.short_cmd.desc: Turn OFF if it collides with another mod's command. Applies on next world join
gui.credit.settings.special_keybinds.des: Enables 1-9 / Ctrl+C/V / arrows + blocks other mod keybinds (master)
gui.credit.settings.quick_add_hotbar.des: Press 1-9 to place the matching hotbar item into the slot under mouse (count=1, NBT kept)
gui.credit.settings.clipboard.enabled.de: Shows a slot next to the inventory. Copy from recipe area / player inv / JEI
gui.credit.settings.clipboard.multi.desc: ON: up to 100 entries scrolled with ↑ (newer) / ↓ (older). OFF: single slot only
gui.credit.settings.clipboard.persistenc: Saved to config/credit-clipboard.dat, restored on restart
command.credit.craftpattern.desc: Open the CraftPattern recipe builder UI
command.credit.craftpattern_probe.desc: Dump full recipe data for a category to file (diagnostic)
command.credit.help.hover_click: Click to insert into chat. Hover for description.
gui.credit.hint.jei_view: View this recipe type in JEI
gui.credit.tagbar.cleanroom.shift_on: Shift+Click: switch to Cleanroom mode (GT only)
gui.credit.cleanroom.unsupported: [CraftPattern] Cleanroom requires a GT recipe draft.
gui.credit.edit.load_failed: [CraftPattern] Cannot load this recipe into draft
gui.credit.delete.already: Already deleted (cleared on /reload or world rejoin)
gui.credit.edit.already: Already edited (cleared on /reload or world rejoin)
gui.credit.delete.no_id: [CraftPattern] Recipe has no stable id (likely dynamic). Cannot delete.
gui.credit.staging.commit_hint: [CraftPattern] Run /credit commit to review, then /credit push to apply.
gui.credit.push.nothing: [CraftPattern] Nothing to push (staging area is empty).
gui.credit.push.no_committed: [CraftPattern] No committed changes (%s pending; run /credit commit first).
gui.credit.commit.title: Credit — Staging Area
gui.credit.commit.empty: Nothing staged. Edit/dump/delete recipes to stage them.
gui.credit.commit.hint: Click ☐ to approve | × to reject | ESC to close
gui.credit.history.title: Credit — Push History
gui.credit.history.empty.staged.hint_bot: → Pushed: %s entries, Immediate: %s — see other tabs.
gui.credit.history.no_selection: Select an entry on the left.
gui.credit.history.click_to_open: Click to view this recipe in JEI
gui.credit.history.recipe_not_found: Recipe '%s' not found in RecipeManager. Run /reload first, then try again.
gui.credit.import.place_files_hint: [CraftPattern] Place credit-generated .js files inside, then run /credit import again.
gui.credit.import.path_not_dir: [CraftPattern] Import path exists but is not a directory: %s
gui.credit.import.no_recipes: [CraftPattern] No parseable recipes found in import files.
gui.credit.import.source_dup_skipped: [CraftPattern] Skipped %s identical duplicate(s) within import files.
gui.credit.import.renamed: [CraftPattern] Renamed %s processed file(s) to *.imported (will be skipped next run).
gui.credit.import.skip_hint: [CraftPattern] Skipped entries failed re-emit (missing serializer, no matching draft, or unrecognized syntax). See log for ids.
gui.credit.help.error.l1: [CraftPattern] Recovering from KubeJS errors caused by past credit-generated recipes:
gui.credit.help.error.l3: 2) Copy your kubejs/server_scripts/generated/ tree (or just the offending .js) into that folder
gui.credit.help.error.l4: 3) Run /credit import again — credit will de-duplicate ids, fix bad ExtremeSmithing format, and stage clean replacements
gui.credit.help.error.l5: Then /credit commit + /credit push as usual. Old files can be deleted or kept (imports go to imported_*.js).
gui.credit.help.null.l2: - Type 'null' (case-insensitive) into any numeric EditBox to mark that field unset.
gui.credit.help.null.l3: - Unset fields are OMITTED from generated code (the whole .field(...) line disappears).
gui.credit.help.null.l4: - Typing any number un-sets and restores presence automatically.
gui.credit.help.null.l5: Warning: marking a REQUIRED field as null may cause KubeJS errors at /reload.
gui.credit.help.null.l6: Verify with /reload after push; if the recipe vanishes, restore the field with a number.
gui.credit.recon.no_generated: [CraftPattern] No <dump_root>/generated/ directory found. Nothing to reconstruct.
gui.credit.recon.no_files: [CraftPattern] No .js files under generated/. Nothing to reconstruct.
gui.credit.recon.breakdown: [CraftPattern] Breakdown: re-emit=%s, copy-thru=%s (failed re-emit kept as-is)
gui.credit.recon.confirm.title: Credit — Reconstruction
gui.credit.recon.confirm.l3: In-source conflicts: %s (manual resolve UI will open)
gui.credit.preview.add.title: Preview — Changed ADD (user)
gui.credit.preview.add_import.title: Preview — Changed ADD (imported)
gui.credit.preview.edit.title: Preview — Changed EDIT (user)
gui.credit.preview.edit_import.title: Preview — Changed EDIT (imported)
gui.credit.preview.edit.empty: No EDIT recipes in this scope.
gui.credit.changed.title: CraftPattern — Changed Recipes
gui.credit.changed.empty: No changed recipes (staging + imported_*.js are empty).
gui.credit.changed.no_drawable: Failed to build drawable for this recipe.
gui.credit.gt.conflict.head: [CraftPattern] WARN: GT recipe input conflicts with %s existing recipe(s):
gui.credit.gt.conflict.hint: → GT will reject one of them. Use Edit on the existing recipe to overwrite instead.
gui.credit.auto.fallback.skeleton: [CraftPattern] WARN: auto-support failed for %s. Skeleton fallback emitted (= no edit effect). Mod-specific emitter needed.
gui.credit.runtime.no_viewer: [CraftPattern] WARN: Neither JEI nor EMI is installed. Credit requires one of them as a recipe viewer. Features are disabled.
gui.credit.import.conflict.title: Credit — Resolve Import Conflicts
gui.credit.settings.imm.master.desc: When ON, ALL operations bypass commit/push and write to file immediately.
gui.credit.settings.imm.warning: WARNING: Bypasses /credit commit + /credit push safety net!
gui.credit.settings.history.max.desc: Maximum number of push entries (older are dropped).
gui.credit.settings.auto_reload.desc: Run /reload automatically after a successful push.
gui.credit.settings.delete_history.label: Delete push history (Shift+Click)
gui.credit.settings.delete_history.confi: [CraftPattern] Hold Shift and click again to delete history.
gui.credit.settings.omit_prefix.warn: Takes effect on next world join (or game restart).
gui.credit.settings.preserve_edit_grid: Keep edit grid on category switch
gui.credit.settings.preserve_edit_grid.d: When OFF (default), switching recipe type while in edit mode clears the loaded grid to avoid creating unintended recipes.
gui.credit.field.unset.hint: Unset — type "null" to clear, any number to set
gui.credit.settings.unified_files.desc: ON (default): <modid>/{add,edit,delete}.js (all recipe types in one set per mod). OFF: <modid>/<recipetype>/{add,edit,delete}.js (split by recipe type). Existing files are not migrated; only future output uses the new layout. Import scans recursively so both layouts are accepted as input.
